name: stakeplate
description: Stake Engine slot built on slotplate architecture: pixi-reels reels, open-ui HUD, Stake networking, local RGS emulator. First game: the Lucky-Magnet digits & magnet design.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n rgs,game -c magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter rgs-emulator dev" "pnpm --filter game dev"
